title: Cocapn Private Repository Configuration
description: Validates the private repo structure (cocapn/config.yml) that defines soul, memory paths, encryption, and sync settings.

soul.description: Relative path to the soul.md file that defines the agent's personality, values, and behavioral guidelines.

config.description: Backend configuration for the private repository.

mode.description: Operating mode for the backend. 'local' runs entirely on the bridge, 'hybrid' adds cloud sync, 'cloud' delegates to Cloudflare Workers.

port.description: WebSocket port for the local bridge server.

tunnel.description: Optional Cloudflare tunnel URL for remote access to the local bridge.

memory.description: Paths to memory storage files within the private repository.

facts.description: Relative path to the facts.json file containing verified knowledge.

procedures.description: Relative path to the procedures directory or file containing learned workflows.

relationships.description: Relative path to the relationships file mapping entity connections and context.

encryption.description: Encryption configuration for secrets stored in the private Git repository.

publicKey.description: age public key used to encrypt secrets before committing to Git.

recipients.description: Additional age public keys that can decrypt secrets (for multi-device or team access).

encryptedPaths.description: Glob patterns for files that must be encrypted before commit.

items.description: Glob pattern matching files requiring encryption (e.g., 'secrets/**', '*.secret.yml').

sync.description: Synchronization intervals and settings for keeping local and remote state aligned.

interval.description: Default sync interval in seconds between local bridge and Git remote.

memoryInterval.description: Sync interval in seconds specifically for memory files (can be more frequent).

autoCommit.description: Whether the bridge should automatically commit changes to the private repo.

autoPush.description: Whether the bridge should automatically push commits to the remote.
